items.title: Neemias Queta was a top-10 center in the regular season, IMO.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Neemias Queta was a top-10 center in the regular season, IMO.

The mental fortitude he showed in Game 7, not letting a series filled with foul trouble or coming off the bench that day undermine him (17 points & 12 rebounds), should reassure them about moving forward with him as their starter.

1/2
